subcodes.title: Words to Juliet Thompson, spoken on 1912-07-10
subcodes.first_line: But he who possesses truthfulness possesses all the virtues. There was once a disciple of Muhammad who asked of another disciple
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @Imam 'Ali, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
